keep_walking_01.speaker: Inner Voice
keep_walking_01.text:
The tunnel stretches.
You can't see the end.
Your feet keep moving.

keep_walking_02.speaker: Inner Voice
keep_walking_02.text:
You remember the office.
The window. The rain.
You recall why you left.

keep_walking_03.speaker: Inner Voice
keep_walking_03.text:
A glow grows ahead.
Its source unknown.
But you trust it's real.

keep_walking_end.speaker: Narrator
keep_walking_end.text:
You step into the light.
The rain stops.
Somewhere, a door opens.
